doctor_turn: How may I help you today?

doctor_turn: Oh no, when did that start?

doctor_turn: OK, and since then you've developed this nasal congestion and sneezing as well?
patient_turn: Yeah exactly, it started a bit afterwards or around the same time.

doctor_turn: Yeah, alright and have you have any other symptoms? Do you have a fever?
patient_turn: Uh, no, I don't think so.

doctor_turn: OK, do you have any difficulties swallowing?

doctor_turn: OK, do you have a cough?

patient_turn: Uh, yeah, now that you say it, yeah, when I was bending over to put my shoes on, I felt just a bit of pressure on the front of my face.

doctor_turn: OK, and you haven't been feeling feverish or having having any chills, right?
patient_turn: No

doctor_turn: OK, any fatigue, malaise, any aches or pains?

doctor_turn: Any rashes?
patient_turn: Uh, no.

doctor_turn: No, OK, Have you been up to date with your immunizations?

doctor_turn: Alright, and just have a couple more questions just to see if anything else is going on. Do you have a headache at all?
patient_turn: Uh, yeah, I've had a headache, since this morning. It's pretty mild. It feels like my head is squeezing. I think, uh, I've had headaches like this before, if I don't sleep well or dehydrated.

doctor_turn: Are you more stressed out than usual? Do you have exams or anything going on right now?
patient_turn: No, schools been pretty good. We've been doing a lot of stuff online, so uh, yeah that's been good.

doctor_turn: OK, any, uh, do you find that your eyes are runny or red or anything like that?
patient_turn: Uh, no, I haven't noticed anything like that.

doctor_turn: OK, alright and any difficulties breathing?

doctor_turn: Any chest pain?
patient_turn: No chest pain.

doctor_turn: Ok, any pain in your belly or any problems with your bowel movements?

doctor_turn: OK, any urinary symptoms?

doctor_turn: OK, alright good. So can you tell me if you have any medical conditions?

doctor_turn: OK, and any medications that you're taking currently, including over the counter pills?

doctor_turn: OK, did you take any medications, to reduce the symptoms that you're having, the headache or the sore throat?

doctor_turn: OK and do you have any allergies?

doctor_turn: Have you been around a cat recently?

doctor_turn: Yeah, do you have any environmental allergies at all?

doctor_turn: Yeah, OK. So in terms of your, uh, so general information. Do you live alone or do you live with your parents or anyone else?

doctor_turn: Alright, and are you currently working or going to school?

doctor_turn: OK, alright, and have you traveled anywhere recently?

doctor_turn: OK, uhm, alright, and do you, uhm, have you had these symptoms anytime recently before?
